_comment: Machine-readable translation rules. Drives both prompt injection AND post-hoc validation. Add per-language entries as patterns are discovered.

_global._brand_casing_note: Brand preservation is case-insensitive in the audit. Languages that capitalize nouns (German: 'Passkey') or use title case at start are accepted. Contamination via native translation (e.g. 'klucz dostępowy', 'パスキー', '通行密钥') is still flagged.
_global._proper_nouns: Treat 'Space' and 'Spaces' as proper nouns — preserve capitalization in the target language whether translated (Espace, Spazio, スペース) or kept English (Space). Never lowercase mid-sentence in source-language compatible scripts.

el.register_description: Use informal singular εσύ family throughout. Greek has both formal and informal — use ONLY informal.

id.register_description: Use formal 'Anda' throughout. Indonesian has formal (Anda) and informal (Kamu) — we use ONLY Anda.

ko.register_description: Use 당신의/당신 form for 'your/you'. Korean has multiple registers — avoid both the honorific 귀하의 and the informal 너의.

zh-CN.register_description: Use 您 throughout for 'you'. Do NOT drop to informal 你 mid-batch.

zh-TW.register_description: Use 您 throughout for 'you'. Do NOT drop to informal 你 mid-batch.

sr.register_description: Use formal Vy/vaš/vaše throughout. Serbian has T/V distinction — never drop to ti/tvoj mid-batch.

sk.register_description: Use formal Vy/váš throughout. Do not mix with informal ty/tvoj or singular imperatives like 'posielaš'.

sl.register_description: Use formal Vy/vaš throughout. Avoid imperatives like 'Misli' (informal); use 'Mislite/Predstavljajte si'.

ru.register_description: Use formal Вы/ваш throughout. Verify grammatical case after prepositions: 'к' takes dative ('к Пространству' NOT 'к Пространство').

pl.register_description: Use informal ty/twój throughout. Verify all diacritics: 'Jesteś' NOT 'Jestes'.

it.register_description: Use informal tu/tuo throughout. Do not mix with 'Lei' or impersonal infinitive imperatives ('Attendere' is wrong; use 'Attendi').

de.register_description: Use informal du/dein throughout. Avoid Sie-form. Do not hyphenate native compounds (Kontoadresse NOT Konto-adresse).

fr.register_description: Use formal vous/votre throughout (French software UIs conventionally use formal vous). Channel='canal' (NOT 'chaîne').

es.register_description: Use informal tú/tu throughout. Avoid usted/ustedes form.

pt.register_description: Use 'você/seu' throughout (Brazilian Portuguese convention). Mute='Silenciar' / Unmute='Reativar som'. Bookmark='Marcador'.

tr.register_description: Use informal -sin/-in endings throughout (Turkish messaging apps default to informal).

he.register_description: Use informal singular masculine שלך throughout. Avoid formal plural שלכם.

ar.register_description: Use informal singular forms throughout. Verify accusative case after verbs (اتصالاً NOT اتصال when object).

fi.register_description: Use sinä/sinun throughout. Use possessive suffixes ('yhteisösi' NOT 'sinun yhteisöt').

no.register_description: Use du/din throughout. Do not hyphenate native compounds (kontonøkkel NOT konto-nøkkel). 'Oppbevar' NOT 'Behold' for safekeeping.

da.register_description: Use du/din throughout. 'Opbevar' NOT 'Behandl forsigtigt'. 'bandlyse' NOT 'bannelyse'.

nl._note: uw and u are too substring-prone for token-based forbidden list (nieuw, jouw, etc. would false-match). Validation must use word-boundary regex if reintroduced.

ro.register_description: Use informal tu/tău throughout. Watch word order with object pronouns: 'Îl poți descărca' NOT 'Poți descărca-l'.

th.register_description: Thai doesn't have strong T/V distinction. Use คุณ throughout.

vi.register_description: Use 'bạn' throughout. Brand: passkey stays as 'passkey' (not 'khóa truy cập').
